title: Income Verification Assertions
description: Reference library demonstrating the §4.4 #38 cross-document reference protocol: the same stable identifier (`totalIncomeArithmetic`) is published here as a library entry with an optional `assertionId` aligned to `id`, and the narrative prose in specs/governance/assertion-library.md §2 shows how a pipeline stage elsewhere would carry either an inline body or an AssertionReference pointing at this URI.

assertions.description: Total income must equal the sum of wage, investment, and other income components.
Wage income values must appear verbatim in the referenced pay-stub document.
